title: Warning Signs For The AI Boom, Anthropic Passes OpenAI, Robinhood’s AI Trading
summary: Alex Kantrowitz and Ranjan Roy discuss warning signs in the AI boom, including explosive token consumption, low deployment rates (only 18% of tokens spent on shipped features), and circular financing dynamics. The episode also covers Anthropic surpassing OpenAI in valuation, Robinhood's AI trading integration, and privacy and ethics concerns around AI services.
